name: Spur Ventures Inc.
description: Spur Ventures Inc. was incorporated under the laws of British Columbia, Canada, on July 24, 1986, originally as Braymart Development Corporation. The company has historically operated as a natural resource entity, focusing on the acquisition and development of gold, base metals, and other mineral-related assets. Additionally, the company has pursued strategic interests in the integrated fertilizer manufacturing sector, specifically aiming to produce high-quality NPK fertilizer for domestic consumption within the Hubei province of China. The company's corporate activities have been listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol SVU.
